zh.lifeSummary: 當(Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate)於1397年出生在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾洛克 霍爾時，她的父親Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick74歲，母親Isobel Torthorwald22歲。她於1412年11月14日與Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag)在英國蘇格蘭度福利爾登斯可雷結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1472年7月17日在她的家鄉享年75歲，埋葬在英國蘇格蘭度福利斯 安德 加洛韋登斯可雷。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当(Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate)于1397年出生在英国苏格兰度福利爾洛克 霍爾时，她的父亲Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick74岁，母亲Isobel Torthorwald22岁。她于1412年11月14日与Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag)在英国苏格兰度福利爾登斯可雷结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1472年7月17日在她的家乡享年75岁，埋葬在英国苏格兰度福利斯 安德 加洛韋登斯可雷。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Kirkpatrick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from either of two places in Dumfriess called Kirkpatrick or any of various other places in Scotland, all so named from the dedication of their church to Saint Patrick. The Scottish word kirk sometimes replaced Gaelic cill ‘church’ in placenames; compare Kilpatrick .

variants.name: Kilpatrick
meanings: Irish (Ulster): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Giolla Phádraig ‘son of the servant of (Saint) Patrick’ (Irish Pádraig). See also Fitzpatrick .
Scottish: habitational name from any of various places called in Gaelic as cill Padraig ‘church of (Saint) Patrick’. See also Kirkpatrick .

nameMeanings.name: Isabella
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

variants.name: Isobella
meanings: form of   Isabel  , which has been popular in England since the 18th century and has recently become the preferred form of the name.

en.lifeSummary: When (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate) was born in 1397, in Rock Hall, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick, was 74 and her mother, Isobel Torthorwald, was 22. She married Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag) on 14 November 1412, in Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 17 July 1472, in her hometown, at the age of 75, and was buried in Dunscore, Dumfries and Galloway, Scotland, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate) est née en 1397, à Rock Hall, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick, avait 74 ans et sa mère, Isobel Torthorwald, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag) le 14 novembre 1412, à Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 17 juillet 1472, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterrée à Dunscore, Dumfries and Galloway, Écosse, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat am 14. November 1412 in Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag) geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Sie starb am 17. ja.lifeSummary: (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate)が1397年にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアロック ハルで生まれた時，父Sir Duncan Kirkpatrickは74歳，母Isobel Torthorwaldは22歳であった。1412年11月14日にイギリススコットランドダムフリーシュアイアダンスコアでGilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag)と結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1472年7月17日に故郷で75歳で死去し，イギリススコットランドダムフリーズ アンド ガロワイダンスコアにて埋葬された。

ko.buried Old Dunscore Kirkyard, Dumfries a: 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 던스코어
ko.lifeSummary: (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate)(이)가 1397년 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 록 홀에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick(은)는 74세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isobel Torthorwald(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1412년 11월 14일 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리실르 던스코어에서 Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag)(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1472년 7월 17일 그녀의 고향에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 스코틀랜드 드프리스 앤드 갈로아이 던스코어에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate) nasceu em 1397, em Rock Hall, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick, tinha 74 anos e sua mãe, Isobel Torthorwald, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag) em 14 de novembro de 1412, em Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 17 de julho de 1472, em sua cidade natal, com 75 anos, e foi sepultada em Dunscore, Dumfries and Galloway, Escócia, United Kingdom.

ru.buried Old Dunscore Kirkyard, Dumfries a: дунскор, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate) родилась в 1397 г. в местности рокк холл, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick было 74 года, а матери, которую звали Isobel Torthorwald, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag) 14 ноября 1412 г. в местности дунскор, думфриессхир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 17 июля 1472 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 75 лет и была похоронена в местности дунскор, думфриесь анд галлоуеи, Шотландия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando (Lady) Isabella de Kirkpatrick (Styled Lady of Rockhall Estate) nació en 1397, en Rock Hall, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Duncan Kirkpatrick, tenía 74 años y su mamá, Isobel Torthorwald, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Gilbert Grierson (Sir, 2nd Feudal Lord of Lag) el 14 de noviembre de 1412, en Dunscore, Dumfriesshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 17 de julio de 1472, en su pueblo, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultada en Dunscore, Dumfries and Galloway, Escocia, Reino Unido.
